label: Multi-portal shimmer — 3 swirls with independent Lissajous drift + interference
notes: portal() function computes one swirl's contribution relative to its own center. Called 3x with offset Lissajous paths (phases 0, 2π/3, 4π/3) and different rotation phases. Additive blend — where spiral arms from different portals cross, intensity compounds (interference nodes). Blur reduced 80→45px so individual portals read when separated. FBM reduced to 3 octaves per call for performance (3 portals × 3 FBM calls each).

operations.note: Full rewrite — portal() function called 3x with independent Lissajous centers. Additive interference.
operations.before: single portal with sine Lissajous center
